queue.hook: Most traders draw S/D zones wrong. 3 rules to fix it.
slide_outline: Slide 1 — Hook: 'Most S/D zones are drawn wrong.'
Slide 2 — Rule 1: Mark from candle body close, not wick.
Slide 3 — Rule 2: Zone is invalid after 2nd successful tap.
Slide 4 — Rule 3: Lower timeframe zones inside higher timeframe zones = highest probability.
Slide 5 — Visual example on NIFTY (no entry/exit prices labelled).
Slide 6 — What kills a zone: aggressive opposing volume on tap.
Slide 7 — CTA: 'Full setup PDF in the kit · link in bio'
queue.caption:
S/D zones become noise the moment they're drawn from wicks instead of bodies. Three rules keep them clean.

— Educational. Not investment advice.
#supplyanddemand #priceaction #niftytrading #marketstructure

[12-25s] 'Same indicator. Trending market = wins. Ranging market = chops you up.'
[25-38s] 'Solution: regime filter on top. Only take signals when market is in trend mode.'
[38-45s] 'Free chart sample with regime layer pre-built — link in description.'
queue.caption:
Regime > indicator. The same setup behaves differently in trend vs range. Filter first, signal second.

#tradingview #regimefilter #niftytrading #priceaction

queue.hook: ₹10,000 account. Risk 1%. How many lots? Most traders get this wrong.
script: [0-3s] Hook on screen: '₹10,000 account. 1% risk. How many lots?'
[3-10s] Show formula: Risk amount ÷ (entry − stop) × lot size = qty.
[10-20s] Walk through: ₹100 risk ÷ 20 point stop ÷ ₹50 NIFTY tick = 0.1 lot. Round down to 0.
[20-27s] 'You can't trade NIFTY at ₹10k. Math doesn't lie. Trade BANKNIFTY or wait.'
[27-30s] 'Free risk calculator on site — does this for you.'
queue.caption:
Position sizing isn't a vibe. It's a calculator. If the math says 0 lots, the answer is 0 lots.

— Educational. Not investment advice.
#riskmanagement #positionsizing #niftytrading #intradaytrading

queue.hook: Market structure in 60 seconds. Higher highs, higher lows. That's it.
script: [0-3s] Hook: 'Market structure in 60 seconds.'
[3-15s] Define: HH + HL = uptrend. LH + LL = downtrend. Anything else = range.
[15-30s] Show NIFTY 15min chart. Mark HH, HL with arrows. 'See it once, see it everywhere.'
[30-45s] BOS (break of structure) = trend confirms. CHoCH (change of character) = trend warning.
[45-55s] Rule: only take longs when HH + HL forming. Skip when in range.
[55-60s] 'Full structure walkthrough on the channel. Link in bio.'
queue.caption:
Structure first. Indicators second. Without HH/HL framing, every signal is just noise on noise.

— Educational. Not investment advice.
#marketstructure #priceaction #niftytrading #tradingview
queue.image_prompt: Vertical reel. NIFTY 15min chart with annotated HH, HL labels. Animated arrows pointing to each. Text overlay: 'BOS' marker at trend continuation. End: brand mark + URL.

queue.hook: If your win rate is 40%, you don't have a problem. You have a math opportunity.
script: [0-3s] Hook: '40% win rate? Not a problem. Math opportunity.'
[3-15s] Show formula: expectancy = (win% × avg win) − (loss% × avg loss).
[15-30s] Worked example: 40% × 3R win − 60% × 1R loss = +0.6R per trade. Profitable.
[30-45s] 'Win rate is a vanity metric. R-multiple is the real edge.'
[45-50s] 'Free risk calc → link in description.'
queue.caption:
R-multiple > win rate. Always.

#riskmanagement #rmultiple #tradingmath #pricing
queue.image_prompt: Vertical YT short. Big animated formula on screen: '40% × 3R − 60% × 1R = +0.6R'. End card with brand mark.

queue.hook: Trend vs range. The single decision that decides your strategy.
slide_outline: Slide 1 — Hook: 'Trend or range? Decide first.'
Slide 2 — Trend signals: ADX > 25, price respecting MA, structure confirming.
Slide 3 — Range signals: ADX < 20, price oscillating between bands, no structure progression.
Slide 4 — Why it matters: trend strategies break in range, range strategies break in trend.
Slide 5 — CTA: 'Our regime filter does this on chart — sample link in bio'
queue.caption:
Choosing the wrong strategy for the regime is the #1 retail killer. Filter first.

— Educational. Not investment advice.
#regimefilter #trendtrading #rangetrading #niftytrading

queue.hook: Why most TradingView signals 'repaint' — and what to look for.
slide_outline: Slide 1 — Hook: 'Repainting indicators are a scam.'
Slide 2 — What it means: signal appears live, disappears after candle closes.
Slide 3 — Why it happens: future-leaking calculations (lookahead = on).
Slide 4 — How to spot: replay chart, check if signal stays.
Slide 5 — CTA: 'Ours uses lookahead = off. Verify on free sample.'
queue.caption:
Repainting is the #1 reason traders lose faith in indicators. Most free TradingView scripts repaint by accident. Replay-test before you trust.

— Educational. Not investment advice.
#tradingview #pinescript #repainting #tradingindicators
